message:
fix: re-add secret redaction changes removed by bd sync

The previous bd sync commit incorrectly removed the secret redaction
implementation. This commit adds back:
- SECRET_PATTERNS with 17 patterns for detecting secrets
- SECRET_REGEXES LazyLock for compiled patterns
- redact_secrets() function
- 16 comprehensive tests
- CLI clippy fixes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
